channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lobster dealer Eric Thibault faces intimidation trial over alleged threats in Nova Scotia court
item.description: A provincial court in Digby, Nova Scotia, heard evidence in the intimidation trial of lobster dealer Eric David Thibault, 66, including a short audio recording of an alleged confrontation from Novembe...

item.title: How Arsenal Became a Beloved Football Club Across Africa
item.description: Arsenal’s influence in Africa transcends mere football fandom. Following their recent Premier League triumph, celebrations erupted across the continent, from Nairobi to Lagos, with fans taking to stre...

item.title: Judge Kathleen Williams Orders Review of Trump IRS Settlement Over Alleged Fraud
item.description: On Friday, Judge Kathleen Williams took a significant step by ordering a review of former President Donald Trump’s $10 billion case against the IRS, citing potential fraud in the settlement process. T...

item.title: Ousmane Dembele Tops 2026 Ballon d'Or Rankings After PSG Clinches Champions League
item.description: The 2026 Ballon d'Or race has taken a fresh turn after Paris Saint-Germain successfully defended their Champions League title on May 30, beating Arsenal at the Puskas Arena in Budapest. Ousmane Dembel...

item.title: Egypt announce 2026 World Cup squad led by Mohamed Salah with inclusion of teenage striker Abdel Karim
item.description: Egypt have officially named their final squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in North America, with Liverpool star Mohamed Salah leading the team as the main attacking figure. Head coach Hossam Hassan co...

item.title: Eric Fructuoso Hosts an Enjoyable Game on Kapamilya Deal or No Deal
item.description: ABS-CBN recently gave viewers an exciting glimpse into the lively and entertaining episode of 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal' hosted by Eric Fructuoso. Known for his charisma and engaging personality, Eri...

item.title: A Review of the Latest TV Shows: Drama, Comedy, and Reboots

item.title: Opposition alleges procedural irregularities in Kochi biomining contract extension
item.description: The Opposition Left Democratic Front (LDF) in the Kochi Corporation has accused Mayor V.K. Minimol of abuse of power in connection with the extension of a biomining contract for legacy waste managemen...

item.title: Ride for Dad announces annual fundraising total for prostate cancer research in Winnipeg
item.description: The article reports on the annual fundraising results of Ride for Dad, a community-driven initiative dedicated to supporting prostate cancer research and awareness in Canada. Based in Winnipeg, the or...

item.title: Governor Yusuf says his administration has delivered 90% of campaign promises in Kano State
item.description: Governor Abba Kabir Yusuf of Kano State has stated that his administration has achieved about 90% completion of the promises he made to the people of the state within three years in office. He made th...

item.title: NMC proposes extending MBBS duration to ten years to finish the course
item.description: The National Medical Commission (NMC) in India has proposed a draft amendment to the Graduate Medical Education Regulations 2023, suggesting that the maximum duration to complete undergraduate medical...

item.title: Tropical Storm Domeng strengthens into typhoon but stays offshore, says PAGASA
item.description: Tropical Storm Domeng has intensified into a typhoon as it continues to move over the Philippine Sea, according to the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAG...

item.title: Concerns raised over Queensland’s stalled progress on expanding single-use plastic bans
item.description: Concerns have been raised that Queensland has lost momentum in expanding its single-use plastic bans, with campaigners arguing the state is falling behind others in Australia. The state initially intr...

item.title: Ykada and guests talk about digital safety on YSpeak 2.0 with Migs Bustos

item.description: Environment Canada has issued rainfall warnings and a special weather statement affecting large areas of British Columbia and Alberta, as a significant weather system brings the risk of prolonged and ...

item.title: Stormers overpower Cardiff with Mchunu leading the pack to reach URC semifinal
item.description: The Stormers delivered a dominant performance at Cape Town Stadium, with Ntuthuko Mchunu shaping the match as the standout loosehead prop. From the opening scrum, the Stormers asserted control, drivin...

item.title: UST and National University set championship clash for NSAC crown
item.description: UST and National University (NU) are set to face each other in the battle for the National Student Athletic Championship (NSAC) crown, as reported by ABS-CBN News. The matchup highlights two of the mo...

item.title: African fabrics that define culture and style beyond Adire and Aso Oke
item.description: This Guardian Life feature explores a rich panorama of African textiles that extend beyond the well-known Adire and Aso Oke. The piece traces how fabrics such as Aso Oke (Yoruba handwoven cloth linked...

item.title: ITLOS rules Equatorial Guinea violated maritime law in Heroic Idun detention, bringing relief to Kochi sailor
item.description: Kochi-based sailor Sanu Jose, who served as chief officer of the cargo vessel MT Heroic Idun, has expressed deep relief after an international tribunal ruled against Equatorial Guinea over the ship’s ...

item.title: White House denies report claiming advisers urged JD Vance to reduce social media activity
item.description: The White House strongly denied a New York Times report alleging that Vice President JD Vance had been advised by senior officials, including Chief of Staff Susie Wiles, to take a step back from his s...
